name: Almond Rice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (amaranth brown rice flour, baking powder, arrowroot powder, and ground almonds) in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the liquid ingredients (honey, almond extract, water or soymilk, and olive oil).
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry mixture and stir until well combined. The batter should be thin.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 12 paper muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Sprinkle a little ground almonds on top of each muffin.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs" (Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc.)
